nasb.text: This expression, “Yet once more,” denotes the removing of those things which can be shaken, as of created things, so that those things which cannot be shaken may remain.

esv.text: This phrase, “Yet once more,” indicates the removal of things that are shaken—that is, things that have been made—in order that the things that cannot be shaken may remain.

cnv.text: “下一次”這句話，是表明那些被震動的，要像被造之物那樣被除去，好使那些不能震動的可以留存，

ccb.text: “再一次”这句话是指上帝要挪去可以被震动的受造之物，使不能被震动的可以长存。

csbs.text: “再一次”这句话表明了那些能够被震动的，就如被造之物，都要被挪去，好使那些不能被震动的可以存留。
